name: Blueberry Marmalade
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the peel from 1 medium orange and 1 medium lemon. Scrape off excess white pith and cut the peel into very fine shreds.
2. Place the shredded peel in a large saucepan with 3/4 cup of water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Remove the white membrane from the fruit and finely chop the pulp (discard seeds). Add this to the pan along with 3 cups of crushed blueberries.
4. Simmer covered for another 12 minutes.
5. Gradually add 5 cups of granulated sugar, bringing the mixture to a full rolling boil. Boil hard for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
6. Remove from heat and stir in half of a 6-ounce (3-ounce total) bottle of liquid fruit pectin. Skim off foam and continue stirring for an additional 7 minutes.
7. Ladle into hot, scalded jars and seal immediately. Makes six half-pints.
